reviews.review_description:
Update 2025-02-16:
Lowering score to 1 star as there hasn’t been any updated or efforts to solve the game breaking state it’s in currently. Sad.

Review as of 2024-03-04:
I can see the potential in this ”sim” but in its current state I can’t give it more than 2 stars (and that is pretty generous). First of all, the default Jet-plane can’t fly properly. When starting the flight the jet just starts to glitch even if I add trottle and try flying the plane properly. So it’s pretty much unplayable.

The plane cockpit looks really unfinished. It feels more like a place holder than anything else.
There doesn’t seem to be a way to switch planes, and that to me is strange since the screenshots on the store page shows a propeller plane but that is nowhere to be found.

So the only reason I’m giving this 2 stars is for the nice Google maps terrain, and the possibility to look at the whole globe in 3d during flight destination select.
I really hope this sim get more attention as it could become great over time!

**And now I’m stuck with the game as I didn’t refund it within 14 days. Well, I hope there will be aome good updates coming down the line**
The detail comes in great in some areas, but I can see it going in a good direction. Please give us an exit app button! Faster/different planes would be a huge improvement.

12/5/24 UPDATE: No updates or development. Game appears to be at a standstill in a unusable condition. WOULD NOT RECCOMEND!


5/5/24
The game is in development and plays like it. But it also has potential to be the top flight sim on standalone.

-There is a random occurrence when you are flying where you randomly begin to tumble for no reason. 
- Only one aircraft (Fighter Jet) and the cockpit is a blurry placeholder that is non interactive at the moment
- No search function on the map and the map moves far too aggressively for accurate selection (Although the map is 3D which I like very much)

Things I would like to see added.
- A take off & landing ability
- Airports designated on the map
- A Cessna & Helicopter option (Slower flight speeds to allow for ground imagery loading time)
- Add search to the map and slow down movement speed as user zooms in 

I was a little disappointed that I was not able to find a discord associated with the game for users to converse with each other and give feedback.

I'm happy with the purchase and excited to see updates! I plan on upgrading my review score as the game progresses so 3 stars may only be temporary!


7/30/24 - UPDATE : No noticable changes or updates.

There not as far as I can see any control layout menu except for press a or x to fly which when you do has aircraft in flight engine off and diving into ground with a voice saying stalling  what I have seen of graphics not as clear as advertisement of game. Going for a refund as impossible to play detail of world is good .devs should put a control menu in game

developer_response.body:
Hello! This experience is under heavy development, we will release a new version that includes a new menu, better controls and more settings in the next few days :) 

Some of the things in our roadmap are:
- More aircrafts
- Real world Airports
- Multiplayer with voice chat
- Weather / Sky system
